---
title: "Data Journalism"
---

Inspired by the work of investigative journalists, I completed a data science minor while at Northwestern to give myself the skills necessary to uncover stories I wouldn't be able to find otherwise. 

I took seven courses for the minor and learned skills in statistics, data visualization, data science techniques, data journalism and data cleaning and predictive modeling. 

These are some projects I've completed for both data science and data journalism courses while I was a student at NU. 

[Data science class project - download to view!](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1HA6NjUWc1GPIKK3U4Dsvo6ZG-NEXWP6x/view)


[Data journalism class project - Cook County diversions program data](https://carlottaang76.quarto.pub/diversions-data-story/)

[The Daily Northwestern - campus-wide polling data ](https://dailynorthwestern.com/2025/05/07/campus/poll-fall-and-now/)
